title: Peppery Mediterranean Eggwhite Stirfry
description: A quick, peppery, ketofriendly dish that blends fresh veggies, zesty oregano, and gooey egg whites for a festive Mediterranean breakfast.

ingredients.name: egg whites
ingredients.notes: whipped lightly with pinch of salt and pepper

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a non‑stick skillet over medium heat.
Add the diced bell pepper and sliced onion; sauté 2–3 minutes until slightly softened.
Stir in the spinach and sun‑dried tomatoes; cook until the spinach wilts, about 1–2 minutes.
Whisk the egg whites together with a pinch of salt, pepper, oregano, and lemon zest.
Pour the whisked whites over the vegetables, allowing them to set on the skillet for 30 seconds.
Gently stir and fold the mixture, letting the whites cook until just set but still slightly gooey, about 2–3 minutes.
Remove from heat, sprinkle with crumbled feta and sliced olives, and serve immediately.
